name: b2b-saas-collaboration-workspace
description: Real-time B2B SaaS collaboration workspace (Slack/Notion inspired). This repository contains two independent applications: the React client (./client) and the Express API server (./server).
author: Romana Parkar

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
